benchmark.comparison_policy: Laboratory / PDG reference values for benchmark only — never HQIV prediction inputs
benchmark.citation: Workman et al. (PDG), Phys. Rev. D 110, 030001 (2024); facility kinematics from published beam energies

mass_sigma_policy.notes: Pass if |pred-ref|/sqrt(sigma_pred^2+sigma_ref^2) <= band when rel/abs tol fails
